title: Elytra Capes
description: Elytra like your cape (make sure to download the correct version for you).
body:
### Future Updates
* This project is ongoing. New capes may be added over time.
* [Mod version](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-and-capes).

## Your Cape, Your Elytras!
This resource pack changes the Elytra texture to match a specific cape, so the design stays consistent while flying.

### Features
* **Custom Icons:** Includes a matching inventory icon.
* **Armor Stand Support:** The Elytra appearance also applies when placed on Armor Stands.
* **Bonus:** Player's elytra is also modified.

### How to Use
1. Download the pack version that corresponds to the cape you want.
2. Enable the resource pack in the game settings.
3. The Elytra and its inventory icon will update to that design.

![Elytras with new icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OTGq34tU/images/5b24b3de5b82881049a690155d56eaf27a3e08e2.png)
